about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Pesnopoets Clima is an authorized dealer of leading air conditioning brands in Varna, Bulgaria. We offer a full range of services — from consultation and selection, through delivery, to professional installation and warranty service.
about.teamParagraph: Behind Pesnopoets Clima is a team of specialists with years of experience in HVAC systems. Our priority is to offer every client a solution tailored to their space and budget — honestly, professionally, and without pressure.

values.title: Original Products
values.desc: We work directly with manufacturers. All products come with full warranty.

values.title: Delivery Across Bulgaria
values.desc: Fast delivery to your address. Real-time availability.

values.title: Professional Installation
values.desc: Installation by certified specialists with years of experience.

values.title: After-Sales Service
values.desc: Warranty and out-of-warranty service. Always available.

montazh.pageSubtitle: Transparent pricing. Fixed rates. Clean install with vacuum.
montazh.tableSubtitle: Price covers all materials and labour for a trace up to 3 m between indoor and outdoor units.
montazh.extrasSubtitle: Added to the base when needed — always agreed in advance.
montazh.beforeAfterSubtitle: Real sites — before and after install by our crew
montazh.noteText: Listed prices are averages for the city of Varna and Varna region. For non-standard jobs (high elevation, awkward access, special materials) prices may differ. A firm quote is issued after a free on-site survey.
montazh.ctaDesc: Our crew will visit your site in Varna, take measurements and provide a written quote.
montazh.neighborhoodsTitle: We cover every district of Varna
montazh.neighborhoodsSubtitle: Our crew operates within 30 km of Varna. Order before noon — install the same day.
montazh.neighborhoodsCta: Don't see your area? Contact us — we probably cover it.
montazh.casesSubtitle: Real jobs from recent weeks — no customer photos, no fabricated reviews.

profilaktika.pageSubtitle: Annual AC service by our own team. Clean filters, lower power bills, healthier indoor air.
includedItems: Removal and full cleaning of filters
Foam wash of indoor unit radiator
Disinfection of indoor unit and drainage
Cleaning of outdoor unit and condenser
Check of electrical contacts and contactor
profilaktika.benefitsDesc: Clean filters and radiator reduce electricity consumption by up to 25%, extend AC lifespan by years and protect indoor air from dust, bacteria and mold.
benefitsItems: Clean and healthy air — no dust, no mold
No unpleasant smell when turned on
profilaktika.tableSubtitle: Fixed prices, no hidden fees. Discounts available for multiple units.
profilaktika.noteText: With regular annual maintenance, problems are caught early and don't grow. One maintenance costs less than a single compressor replacement.
profilaktika.symptomsSubtitle: If you notice any of these symptoms — don't postpone, call us.
symptomsItems: Weak airflow from the indoor unit
Water dripping from the indoor unit
Noise, knocking or vibration during operation
AC doesn't cool as well as before
Higher electricity bill for no reason
No maintenance done for over a year
profilaktika.frequencySubtitle: Depends on operating intensity and the environment of the AC.

frequencyItems.who: Standard home use — spring, before active use.
Renovation dust clogs filters and radiator within days.

profilaktika.neighborhoodsSubtitle: Our team comes within 30 km of Varna. Request before noon — usually we come the same day.
profilaktika.relatedMontazhDesc: We do turnkey installation by our own team with a 12-month warranty.
profilaktika.ctaDesc: Get in touch — we'll suggest a convenient day and arrive with full equipment.

daikinVarna.pageTitle: Daikin air conditioners in Varna — sales, installation and service
daikinVarna.pageSubtitle: Original Daikin from authorized importer — with factory warranty and own service in Varna. Same-day delivery and installation by our team.
daikinVarna.whySubtitle: Daikin is the world's #1 AC manufacturer — Japanese quality, Japanese compressor, one of the highest energy ratings on the market.

whyItems.title: Japanese compressor
whyItems.desc: The heart of Daikin — proprietary Swing/Reluctance DC compressor with 5-year warranty. Quiet, efficient, reliable.

whyItems.title: Energy class A+++
whyItems.desc: Daikin Sensira and Emura have one of the highest SCOP ratings on the market — up to 5.10. Real electricity savings year-round.

whyItems.title: R-32 refrigerant
whyItems.desc: New-generation refrigerant — better cooling, lower carbon footprint, cheaper recharging.

whyItems.title: Whisper-quiet mode
whyItems.desc: Touch-sensitive control, Whisper-quiet mode down to 19 dB — quieter than a whisper in a library.

daikinVarna.rangeSubtitle: Prices update automatically from the importer. We include installation by our team, 12 months workmanship warranty plus full factory warranty.

rangeItems.name: Daikin Sensira FTXC
rangeItems.desc: The most affordable Daikin range — excellent price/quality ratio. For bedroom, living room, small apartment.

rangeItems.name: Daikin Emura
rangeItems.desc: Designer range — glass front panel, Red Dot Design Award winner. For living rooms with high interior demands.

rangeItems.name: Daikin Comfora Plus
rangeItems.desc: Premium range with Wi-Fi and motion sensor. Higher SCOP than Sensira, quieter mode, better filtration. For large living room or whole apartment.

daikinVarna.installDesc: Daikin installation by our own team with professional vacuum evacuation — a factory requirement for valid warranty. Fixed prices, copper pipe, all materials and commissioning included.
daikinVarna.maintenanceDesc: Annual maintenance from €42 preserves compressor efficiency and extends AC life by years. Daikin requires regular service for valid warranty after year 2.

warrantyItems.title: 5 years compressor
warrantyItems.desc: Factory warranty on the DC compressor — the most expensive AC component.

warrantyItems.title: 3 years rest of the unit
warrantyItems.desc: Electronic boards, fans, sensors — full factory warranty.

warrantyItems.title: 12 months installation
warrantyItems.desc: Workmanship warranty from our team — we fix any issue free of charge.

warrantyItems.title: Local service in Varna
warrantyItems.desc: We don't ship anything to Sofia — everything is serviced on-site, fast.

daikinVarna.neighborhoodsTitle: Daikin delivery and installation across Varna
daikinVarna.neighborhoodsSubtitle: We cover all city neighborhoods and the region within 30 km. For requests before noon — usually same day.
daikinVarna.ctaDesc: Get in touch — we'll suggest a model for your room and budget, installation on a day convenient for you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page describes how we collect and use your personal data when using our website.
privacy.dataText: When filling out the inquiry form, we collect: name, phone number, email (optional), and message. This data is used solely to process your inquiry.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using this website, you accept these terms of service.
terms.pricesText: All prices are in Bulgarian Lev including VAT. Prices and availability are updated automatically every 2 hours. Discrepancies between displayed and actual availability may occur.

aiConsultant.title: AI Assistant
aiConsultant.subtitle: Find your ideal AC in 2 minutes
aiConsultant.desc: Our AI consultant knows all 458 products, compares models and finds the best option for your budget and room size.

items.a: Standard installation takes 2-4 hours. Includes mounting indoor and outdoor units, pipe routing up to 3 m, vacuuming and testing.
Yes, delivery within Varna and the region is free when purchased with installation.
Manufacturer warranty of 24-36 months (depends on brand) + 12 months installation warranty from our team.

items.q: Can it be installed in winter?
items.a: Yes, AC installation is possible year-round. Inverter models efficiently heat down to -15°C and below.
Indoor and outdoor unit mounting, copper pipe up to 3 m with insulation, power cable, brackets, vacuuming, startup and cleanup.
Standard installation has a fixed price. Extra charges apply only for non-standard conditions (pipe over 3 m, difficult access). Everything is agreed in advance.

urgency.peakSeason: Peak season — reserve your installation now
